dungeon: Early-build (X1.5) multi-dungeon run — elemental dragon LORDS (Treesmasher + Firebreather) + others
map: DOCUMENTED biomes: green FOREST floor (Treesmasher/Collapsed Woods), red LAVA floor (Firebreather/Flaming Hearth), gold/yellow temples, blue ocean, purple dungeons, a pink radial-attack boss arena, grey crypts. Multi-dungeon maxing session.

bosses.name: Treesmasher (Collapsed Woods lord)
bosses.note: Elemental (earth/wood) dragon LORD. Green forest arena. Matches dev-blog 'dormant Treesmasher'. Present in EARLY X1.5 build -> original content.

bosses.name: Firebreather (Flaming Hearth lord)
bosses.note: Elemental (fire) dragon LORD. Red lava arena. Same 'You have awoken the...' awakening-taunt pattern as Treesmasher. Confirms the 4 elemental dragons as realm Lords in the original game.

mechanics: DOCUMENTED (early X1.5 build): the ELEMENTAL DRAGON LORDS (Treesmasher=earth/wood, Firebreather=fire; Riverborn=water elsewhere) are realm bosses that share a 'You have awoken the [Lord]...' awakening taunt — confirming they're original 2017-2018 content (not just 2021 ACED). BOOSTER SYSTEM confirmed: status lines 'You have a <N>% drop chance boost.', 'You have no tier booster active.', 'You have no XP booster active.' (drop-chance / tier / XP boosters players can activate). 'You're already maxed.' message when drinking a pot on a maxed stat. Events: Mad Jester defeated, Skull Shrine spawned (announcer persona Sprite).
uncertain: Dragon taunt endings clipped ('You have awoken the ...'). Attack patterns not isolated. Which exact dungeons the gold/pink/purple arenas are = unconfirmed.
confidence: HIGH for Treesmasher + Firebreather as elemental Lords with awakening taunts + the booster system (DOCUMENTED); MEDIUM for biomes.
